input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.2.3
            TITLE: a firewall must separate the fuel tank from the driver, per t.1.8

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.2.3: A Firewall must separate the Fuel Tank from the driver, per T.1.8
IC.5.2.3 A Firewall must separate the Fuel Tank from the driver, per T.1.8

final_answer: A Firewall must separate the Fuel Tank from the driver, per T.1.8
